Package org.tquadrat.foundation.testutil.impl

@API(status=STABLE, since="0.0.1") package org.tquadrat.foundation.testutil.impl
The implementations of some common interfaces that are sometimes used in the tests.
  • Related Packages

    Description
    org.tquadrat.foundation.testutil
    Classes that are meant to support the writing of JUnit tests.

    An implementation of Name for test purposes.
